scenarios.name: Audit codebase for missing or undocumented environment variables
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests grepping process.env but typically produces a single list; treatment matches the skill's three-category report (undocumented, no validation, stale) using the exact grep+sed+sort pipeline.

scenarios.name: Compare staging vs production env vars before launch
scenarios.rationale: Baseline diffs variable names but misses the identical-secret-as-security-risk flag and the NEXT_PUBLIC_/VITE_ client-exposure check that the skill explicitly enforces.
